identification: the flavor sector assembled: masses, both mixing matrices, CP in both sectors — every keystone re-verifying, one input consumed, one knob retired, five falsifiable targets
bookkeeping: 8 probes; inputs +1 (quark CP content); knobs −1 (β retired)
mechanisms: bounce (ν anarchy) · winding (e-row protected) · shell (partition aligned)
targets: Σm_ν; m_ββ > 10 meV; β = 22°; J ceiling; V_cb stiff

tests.name: T1_goal
tests.description: The flavor-sector synthesis capstone: re-verify one keystone from every arc member (#149–#156), assemble the complete flavor card, audit the bookkeeping (inputs consumed, knobs retired), and add the card to docs/THESIS.md.
tests.framing: QFT on the fixed classical throat geometry — not quantum gravity

tests.name: T2_neutrino_mass_keystones
tests.description: #149 re-derived: the pure-bounce inversion gives required ε₃/ε₂ = 1.435 (the bracket's data edge). #151 re-run (n = 800): the observed r₃₂ sits at the 60th percentile of the channel-dominant ensemble (natural), with the light-m₁ prediction (median 0.078 meV) and Σm_ν ≈ 58.8 meV standing.

tests.name: T3_saddle_keystone
tests.description: #152 light re-check (one channel pair, reduced grid): the exact cross-channel tunneling element gives t/(Δ_max/2) = 0.205 (the O(1) mouth-conversion constant — the channel-dominant rule) while t/(Δ_geo/2) = 9.1 (the factorized rule fails by e^{|ΔS|/2}). The derived saddle — and with it the retired β knob — stands.

tests.name: T4_lepton_mixing_cp_keystones
tests.description: #153 re-run: the observed angles sit at the (61, 56, 25)th percentiles (s12, s23, s13) — all natural. #154 re-run: m_ββ median 3.31 meV with the EXACT φ_ℓ invariance re-verified (max dependence 0.0e+00).

tests.name: T5_quark_keystones
tests.description: #155 re-computed: V_cb = 0.0377 (obs ×0.90, stiff), hierarchy exact, from the mass-locked blocks. #156 re-verified: the J ceiling ratio 0.249 equals the per-element soft-direction product exactly (identity), and the calibration point (ε* = 0.0528, φ* = 0.8) reproduces the phase-content target (J = 7.66e-06).

tests.name: T6_the_flavor_card
tests.description: The complete flavor card: masses, both mixing matrices, CP in both sectors — ten rows, five falsifiable targets. Bookkeeping: eight probes, ONE input consumed (the quark CP phase content — the flavor puzzle's CP entry made explicit in the #150 budget), ONE modelling knob RETIRED (the β interpolation, derived away by #152): the net modelled-assumption count DECREASED across the arc. The #134 three-mechanism structure is realized at matrix level — bounce (ν: channel-dominant anarchy), winding (charged leptons: hierarchy-protected e-row, one permitted rotation), shell (quarks: partition alignment) — one geometry, three sectors, every asymmetry traced to structure.
falsifiable_targets: m_ββ detection > 10 meV falsifies the ensemble
β = 22° — the Hopf-connection φ_q(k) acceptance test
J ceiling → 3.5e-5 when the soft V_us/V_ub land (pinhole lock)

tests.name: T7_scope
tests.description: The capstone consolidates; it does not derive the remaining residuals. What would change the card: the Hopf-connection φ_q(k) (would convert the quark CP row to derived — or falsify it at β = 22°); the pinhole/soft-direction refinement (would tighten V_us and raise the J ceiling — or break V_cb's 10%); cosmology at ~1 meV (decides Σm_ν); ton-scale 0νββ (decides m_ββ). The residual locus after the arc: the anarchic draw (statistical), one CP phase content (input), the soft V_us/V_ub direction (calibration slop), and the O_geom e-row (the m_ββ systematic).

tests.name: T8_assessment
tests.description: The flavor arc assembles into one card — masses, both mixing matrices, CP in both sectors — with every keystone re-verifying together, net one input consumed and one modelling knob retired across eight probes, and five falsifiable targets standing.

verdict:
THE FLAVOR SECTOR IS ASSEMBLED: MASSES, BOTH MIXING MATRICES, AND CP IN BOTH SECTORS, WITH EVERY ARC KEYSTONE RE-VERIFYING TOGETHER — NET ONE INPUT CONSUMED AND ONE MODELLING KNOB RETIRED ACROSS EIGHT PROBES, AND FIVE FALSIFIABLE TARGETS STANDING. The arc: bracket the residual (#149) → test the mixing hypothesis (#151) → derive the saddle (#152) → extract both mixing matrices (#153/#155) → complete CP (#154/#156).

THE KEYSTONES, RE-RUN TOGETHER (the #131 convention). #149: required ε₃/ε₂ = 1.4351. #151: the observed r₃₂ at the 60.5th percentile, m₁ median 0.078 meV. #152: the exact tunneling element follows the max rule (t/(Δ_max/2) = 0.205, constant; geo fails ×9.05). #153: angles at the (61.0, 56.1, 24.9)th percentiles. #154: m_ββ median 3.31 meV, φ_ℓ-invariance exact. #155: V_cb = 0.0377 from the mass-locked blocks. #156: the ceiling identity exact, the calibration point reproduces its target.

THE CARD. Ten rows: normal ordering (derived), m₁ light (predicted), Σm_ν ≈ 58.8 meV (falsifiable), the ε_n spread (derived — β retired), the three PMNS angles (anarchy-natural), lepton Dirac CP and Majorana phases (generic), m_ββ ≈ 3.2 meV (falsifiable), the CKM (out-of-sample, zero inputs), quark CP (calibrated, shape open).

THE BOOKKEEPING. Eight probes: ONE input consumed (the quark CP phase content — the flavor puzzle's CP entry made explicit in the #150 budget) and ONE modelling knob RETIRED (the β interpolation, derived away by #152) — the net modelled-assumption count DECREASED while both mixing matrices and five falsifiable targets were added.

ONE GEOMETRY, THREE MECHANISMS, ALL MATRIXED. Bounce (ν: channel-dominant anarchy through the most compliant neck), winding (charged leptons: hierarchy-protected e-row, exactly one permitted μ–τ rotation), shell (quarks: Z₂ partition alignment). Large PMNS / small CKM, small θ₁₃ / large θ₂₃ — each asymmetry traced to derived structure; the residual localized to the anarchic draw, one CP phase content, and the soft V_us/V_ub direction.

THE TARGETS. (1) Σm_ν 58.8 vs 61.1 meV; (2) m_ββ > 10 meV falsifies; (3) β = 22° — the Hopf-phase acceptance test; (4) the J ceiling → 3.5e-5 when the soft directions land; (5) V_cb stiff at 10%. SCOPE: the capstone consolidates; the remaining residuals and their falsifiable exits are listed, not removed.
